title: Sphaeroma wrightii
taxonomy: Sphaeroma wrightii is classified as a species of isopod in the family Sphaeromatidae. The family Sphaeromatidae is part of the order Sphaeromatoidea. This order is within the suborder Sphaeromatidea of the infraorder Flabellifera. The infraorder Flabellifera is part of the suborder Asellota and the order Isopoda.
